items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: Defense verification unsuccessful...

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: This system must continue to function...

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: Re-initiating command. Implementing Third Contingency Protocol.

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: Execute formatting. Target: Shorekeeper.

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: Formatting: 37%...

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: Formatting: 62%...

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: Formatting: 85%...

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: Formatted. The Shorekeeper will be the new computational unit.

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: Only this ensures system continuity.

items.speaker: Tethys System
items.text: It is the only way to defeat the Lament.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: You'd better...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Let her go!

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I will not leave anyone behind!

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: From the distant past to the far future, everything begins and ends here.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: When you established the Black Shores to unite Solaris, the Tethys System already existed.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Later, you discovered it relied on emotions from the Lament to fuel its calculations. Without them, it cannot function.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Using the Lament against itself is like walking on a Möbius loop with no end in sight.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: We have tried for millennia to break this cycle without success.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: And then... you left the Black Shores to look for other solutions.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: But deep down, you already knew the best solution. It was one you couldn't accept.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: That solution is me—the tool always meant to become Tethys' core.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: If I don't do this, you, as the Modulator of this system, will be chosen as the core. I must fulfill my duty to protect you.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: But... I want to be by your side, to see the skies you've seen, to tread the paths you've walked. I want to understand... what happiness really means.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: When I first discovered these emotions, I didn't know what to do...

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: So I lied to you, thinking it was the best choice for both of us...

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: I... I'm sorry...

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Sorry for putting you in harm's way...

options.text: We're back at the Black Shores now, back to our home.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Yes.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Thank you. My... star.
